title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 20 lines).
summary_text: - High: [auto-push-after-commit.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L27) only checks `tool_output.stdout` for failure and then runs `git push` automatically at [L35](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/hooks/auto-push-after-commit.sh#L35). That can publish code without explicit approval, and on commit failures that only appear in `stderr` it may still push the previous HEAD. - High: the diff includes raw session/memory logs with operational details and command history, e.g. [bookkeeping/experience.jsonl](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/experience.jsonl#L152) and [agent-memory/experience.jsonl](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/agent-memory/experience.jsonl#L22). Committing these is a privacy/security leak and will create noisy, non-deterministic churn. - Medium: the new recipe loader reads `~/.claude/rules/dev-recipes.json` and `~/.claude/assets/docs/dev-power-words.json` at [recipe-loader.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/recipe-loader.mjs#L13), but this diff adds [assets/rules/dev-recipes.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L1) and no `dev-power-words.json` under `assets/`. On a clean checkout, `--recipe` will silently fall back and power-word enrichment will never load. - Medium: recipe contracts declare review requirements for tier-1/2 recipes like [feature-add](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L34), [refactor](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L92), and [mcp-integration](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/rules/dev-recipes.json#L150), but `continueRun()` still skips review for all `tier <= 2` unless `securityReviewRequired` at [fugue-execute.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs#L731). That means `reviewThreshold` and `doneConditions` are ignored for most recipes.
